children.text: The four friends went to a hill.
children.cn: 四个好朋友去了一座小山。
children.statement: 有四个朋友一起去爬山。
children.explanation: 文中说 'The four friends went to a hill'。

children.text: "Let's see who gets to the top first!" said Amy.
children.cn: “让我们看看谁先到山顶！”艾米说。
children.statement: 艾米提议进行一场比赛。
children.explanation: 艾米说看看谁先到山顶，这是一种比赛形式。

children.text: They all hurried up to the top of the hill.
children.cn: 他们都匆忙向山顶跑去。
children.explanation: 文中说 'hurried up'（匆忙地），意味着跑得很快。

children.text: At first, Daming was at the front.
children.explanation: 文中说 'Daming was at the front'（大明在前面）。

children.statement: 大明一直保持着最快的速度。
children.explanation: 文中说 'he slowed down'（他慢了下来）。

children.text: One by one, his friends went past him.
children.cn: 一个接一个，他的朋友们超过了他。
children.keywords: one by one, friends, past him
children.statement: 他的朋友们都落后于大明。
children.explanation: 文中说朋友们 'went past him'（超过了他）。

children.statement: 玲玲是第一个到达山顶的人。

children.explanation: 文中说 'waited and waited'（等了又等），说明等了很久。

children.text: At last, Daming came with a big bag.
children.cn: 最后，大明提着一个大袋子来了。
children.explanation: 文中说他带着一个 'big bag'（大袋子）。

children.text: "I saw some rubbish on the way. I picked it up."
children.cn: “我在路上看到一些垃圾。我把它们捡起来了。”
children.statement: 大明变慢是因为他在捡垃圾。
children.explanation: 大明解释说他捡了路上的垃圾。

children.text: "Daming, you're the real winner!" said Lingling.
children.cn: “大明，你才是真正的赢家！”玲玲说。
children.statement: 玲玲觉得大明的行为非常值得赞赏。
children.explanation: 她说大明是 'real winner'，肯定了他的行为。
